title: Design a GraphQL API for User Authentication
scenario: Create a GraphQL API for user authentication, including endpoints for registering new users, logging in existing users, and resetting passwords. The API should also include a feature to retrieve a user's profile information. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular GraphQL library (e.g. Apollo Server, GraphQL.js)
Must include at least 4 GraphQL types for user authentication
Must implement password hashing and salting

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Is the GraphQL schema correct and well-structured?
Does the code snippet follow best practices for user authentication and password storage?
